mapper.insert: INSERT INTO peak_price(merchant_id, name, time_range, week_days, rate, status) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{timeRange}, #{weekDays}, #{rate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE peak_price SET name=#{name}, time_range=#{timeRange}, week_days=#{weekDays}, rate=#{rate}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
